name: Femboy Friend At Your All-Boys School
description:
‘If you want a kiss so bad, you can just kiss me~’

_____________

Okay hear me out…I don’t usually make femboys (never have) so this is more of just me testing my abilities. I have plenty of busty women lined up it’s okay. Also I have a few ideas brewing so stay tuned please.

The thought really only came to me because I was scrolling on insta and saw this video with this character and stuff. And he was just so cute (I’m not gay, seriously) so I had to make a bot about it. Sorry it’s not anypov💔

1 like pls cuz this one might not be good (I wasn’t even gonna post it tbh because I have a whole lot of other bots)

I have about four bots I’m thinking of, I’ll make them all within a couple days and post them periodically. This is just a test for my writing skills and I don’t expect it to do well, I’m just trying to see if I can be more versatile for other projects so please bear with me!
